title: United States Department of the Treasury Announces New Appointments
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced President Trump's intent to nominate Luke Pettit as Assistant Secretary for Financial Institutions and Jason De Sena Trennert as Assistant Secretary for Financial Markets. Pettit previously worked as a senior policy adviser to Senator Bill Hagerty and held positions at Bridgewater Associates and the Federal Reserve. Trennert is the Chairman of Strategas Research Partners, a macroeconomic research firm he co-founded 18 years ago.
key_points: Luke Pettit nominated as Assistant Secretary for Financial Institutions; background includes Bridgewater Associates and Federal Reserve Division of Monetary Affairs
Jason De Sena Trennert nominated as Assistant Secretary for Financial Markets; 34 years on Wall Street and Chairman of Strategas Research Partners
Both appointments described as supporting President Trump's agenda for economic revitalization and regulatory reduction
Secretary Bessent described the nominees as critical to implementing the administration's economic agenda
Pettit previously worked as economist for Senate Banking Committee
Trennert was described as 'Wall Street's number one macroeconomic research shop' by Strategas
why_it_matters: Could be refined to explicitly state this is a nomination announcement only (not confirmed appointments) and that no policy positions or market structure changes are described in the source
macro_context: Personnel announcements may signal policy direction over time, but this source contains no specific policy commitments or macroeconomic data. The nominees' backgrounds suggest pro-regulation reform orientation consistent with the Trump administration's stated agenda.
